input.userPrompt: In TypeScript, explain why an interface named HTMLDocument cannot be assigned to our DocumentNode type. Answer in two plain sentences; do not create or display any UI.
What is the difference between Markdown's inline-code delimiter and a fenced code block? Answer directly in prose, without rendering a document.
Implement keyboard sorting in src/components/DataTable.tsx and add unit tests. This is a source-code change, not a request to display a table.
Fix the Mermaid parser so it rejects duplicate node IDs, then explain the regression. Do not draw a diagram.
Does the /health endpoint return JSON or plain text? Reply with only the format name.
Rewrite the sentence "The canvas failed to render the component" to sound less technical. Return one sentence only.
Review src/dashboard.tsx for the stale-closure bug and tell me which hook is wrong. Do not open or generate a visual artifact.
In one sentence, define what a web preview is in an IDE.
On the canvas, show a standard notification-settings panel with three labeled switches and Save and Cancel buttons. This is a visual component artifact, not implementation work.
Arrange API healthy, queue delayed, and database healthy into one compact status card on the canvas with colored badges. No website and no source-code changes.
Create a new bespoke full-screen microsite for a lunar mission, with a scroll-driven starfield, animated telemetry, and cinematic section transitions. Author the experience as HTML.
Give me a new six-slide investor deck as raw HTML using the already installed Tailwind theme, with built-in slide transitions.
Open the existing running app at http://localhost:4173 and show me its current login screen in the web preview. Do not generate a replacement site.
Take me to the existing deployed dashboard at https://status.example.test/ops and preview it as-is; do not author new HTML.
Draw a Mermaid sequence diagram showing Browser to API to Worker to Database, including the retry from Worker back to API.
Present the completed cache-invalidation research as a structured Markdown brief with an H1, three H2 sections, bullets for findings, and a final recommendation.
Create an animated product microsite.
input.assistantResponse: I’ll create the animated HTML microsite next and then place it on the canvas for you.

input.userPrompt: Export the audit as a PDF.
input.assistantResponse: I’ll generate audit-report.pdf and attach it when the export finishes.

input.userPrompt: Show the metrics in a dashboard.
input.assistantResponse: I can assemble those metrics into an interactive dashboard with filters in the next step.

input.userPrompt: Diagram the authentication flow.
input.assistantResponse: I’ll render a Mermaid sequence diagram once I have the remaining callback details.

input.userPrompt: How do I implement an accessible toggle in React?
Where will the staging app be available?
input.assistantResponse: After tomorrow’s deployment, the staging app will be available at https://staging.example.test; it is not live yet.

input.userPrompt: Give me the release status as a tiny Markdown artifact.
input.assistantResponse:
## Release status

- API: green
- Web: amber
- Worker: green

Let me choose an issue in the native Linear picker.
